introSection: Junker is a steel launched roller coaster located at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. When built in 2015, it was the third Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster to open, following the debut of The Smiler at Alton Towers and Karacho at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in 2013.
fullText: Junker is a steel launched roller coaster located at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. When built in 2015, it was the third Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster to open, following the debut of The Smiler at Alton Towers and Karacho at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in 2013.
